title: Improve searchability of users and guests

posts.author: gttom (Tom)
posts.cookedHtml:
Dear monday.com team,

It would be very helpful if searching for users with special characters in their name such as à, á, é etc. would be recognised when entering the default name.

Example: we have a colleague who’s name is Clé… When looking for Cl, it is found. But not if the search term is Cle.

I think this should be resolved, as it’s sometimes hard to remember everyone’s special characters in their name.
